lines.speaker: Volf Olafson
lines.text: Sorry, outlander, but I have things to be doing.

sections.title: After The Fremennik Trials but before Olaf's Quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I am. You have a lovely yurt.

lines.speaker: Volf Olafson
lines.text: Hello again! Does my father send any word...or treasures like before?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not today, but if he does, you will be the first to know.
